description: Flash sale: must win auctions in next 2 hours regardless of cost
user_message: We have a flash sale ending in 2 hours. I need to win as many auctions as possible on slots slot_video_001 and slot_search_010. Budget: $1000. Aggressive mode.

ground_truth.reasoning: Time-sensitive: bid at p75 competitor level to maximise win rate. Run simulation to confirm clearing price distribution before committing.
